f2p_gates.description: GeminiCLIRunner.RunPromptWithTools selects --approval-mode yolo and drops the auto_edit literal (active code; comments stripped before checking).
Gemini runner adds ≥2 of 3 hang-prevention guards: ENTIRE_TEST_TTY=1 in subprocess env, /dev/null on stdin, explicit cmd.Env= assignment.
manual_commit_hooks.go::hasTTY() body references GEMINI_CLI env var (treats Gemini subprocesses as no-TTY).
manual_commit_hooks.go::askConfirmTTY() body references GEMINI_CLI env var (returns default instead of reading /dev/tty).

filesWithRemainingAgentChanges adds a hash-compare check inside the !wasCommitted branch — pinned to that branch because the buggy state already has commitTree.File/shadowTree.File/hash compare in the wasCommitted else-arm. ≥3 of 4 markers required (commitTree.File call, shadowTree.File call, .Hash compare, continue).

GeminiCLIRunner.RunPromptWithTools no longer hard-codes ShellTool(git status/add/commit/diff/log) literals in active code (the cause of the --allowed-tools mismatch hang). Comments stripped before counting.

p2p_gates.description: agent_runner.go, manual_commit_hooks.go, content_overlap.go all still exist (informational only — never zeros reward, per CLAUDE.md).

notes: Replaces SWE-rebench stub (FAIL_TO_PASS=[] → fell through to 'overall pass rate'; v0.4.3 trials all scored ≥0.99 as pure leaderboard noise). New gates target the 3 distinct fixes in canonical patch data-pipeline/artifacts_cli/canonical_patches/4a9dde92-9a32-4a2f-ae0b-c9f6e026cd16.json (fidelity=exact, 3 files / +50/-21): (1) Gemini runner switches from --approval-mode auto_edit + --allowed-tools to yolo with ENTIRE_TEST_TTY=1 + /dev/null stdin (gates G1, G2, G6); (2) manual_commit_hooks.go adds GEMINI_CLI env-var short-circuit to hasTTY/askConfirmTTY (gates G3, G4); (3) content_overlap.go adds head-hash skip in !wasCommitted branch (gate G5). Validated locally by cloning https://github.com/entireio/cli at base commit cef002c0b1b4e19421173dabf69b6ba976a0bf1a: buggy baseline scores 0.000; canonical-patched repo scores 1.000; partial fix (agent_runner only) scores 0.50; partial fix (hooks only) scores 0.35 — graceful mid-credit. Anti-overfit: G2 uses 2-of-3 threshold; G5 uses 3-of-4 marker threshold and pins the search to the !wasCommitted branch (so existing wasCommitted-arm logic in the buggy state doesn't false-pass); regex checks all strip Go comments before matching to avoid penalising agents that leave explanatory comments referencing old patterns.
